brief_html: This message will encrypt your CD-key, and will reply with the properly encoded CD-key as it is supposed to be sent in the message C>S [0x51] SID_AUTH_CHECK. It now works with CD-keys of all products.
remarks_html: This message will encrypt your CD-key, and will reply with the properly encoded CD-key as it is supposed to be sent in the message C>S [0x51] SID_AUTH_CHECK. It now works with CD-keys of all products.
